katelyn.bio: Kat is a Roblox streamer who loves sharing fun adventures and creative builds with her community. With a passion for gaming and a friendly vibe, she makes every stream a blast!

posts.title: New commission slots are open! 🎨
posts.content: Hey everyone! I'm opening 5 commission slots this week. DM me for details on pricing and availability. Supporters get priority booking!

posts.title: Thank you for 2,000 followers! 💖
posts.content: I can't believe we hit 2k! Thank you all so much for the support. I'm working on something special to celebrate. Stay tuned!

posts.title: Behind the scenes: my drawing process ✏️
posts.content: Here's a peek at how I create my illustrations from sketch to final color. I use Procreate + Clip Studio for most of my work.

shop.name: Custom Character Commission
shop.description: Get your OC or favorite character drawn in my style! Full color, high-res PNG.

shop.name: Digital Sticker Pack
shop.description: 12 cute stickers featuring my original characters. PNG + Telegram format included.

shop.name: Wallpaper Bundle
shop.description: 10 kawaii wallpapers for phone & desktop. New batch every month for members!
